fields.label: Bearer Token
fields.helpText: App-only Bearer Token from X Developer Portal → your project → Keys and tokens

healthcheck_config.description: Validates Bearer Token via public user lookup

metadata.summary: X (formerly Twitter) API v2 for reading tweets, searching content, tracking trends, and publishing posts.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to developer.x.com and sign up for a developer account
2. Create a Project + App
3. Generate a Bearer Token in Keys and tokens
4. Paste the Bearer Token here

Note: Most read endpoints require the Basic tier ($200/mo) or higher. The Free tier is limited to posting tweets and the user lookup endpoints.
